BlastR is a tool for coordinating your W: BlastR is a tool for coordinating your WoW raid team. You can create your own team or join an existing one using an invite link from your Raid Leader.
Choose \"Create New Team\" if you are th: Choose "Create New Team" if you are the Raid Leader or want to start a new group.

Select the region matching your WoW acco: Select the region matching your WoW account (EU or US).
Paste the invite link your Raid Leader s: Paste the invite link your Raid Leader sent you. It looks like: blastr.gg/join/TOKEN. You can paste the full link or just the token part.
Paste the full invite link — we'll extra: Paste the full invite link — we'll extract the token automatically.

landing.subheadline: A full-featured platform for WoW guilds: from automated gear audits to AI-powered log analysis and interactive raid tactics.
landing.cta_login: Create a Static — Login via Battle.net
landing.roster_desc: The platform focuses on the living player, not a single character. Perfect for split raids and alt management. Automatic sync with Blizzard API and Raider.io.
landing.roster_f1: Instant gear audit: missing enchants, sockets, tier sets
landing.roster_f2: Great Vault and weekly activity tracking for every raider
landing.roster_f3: Weekly snapshots — compare roster progress week over week
landing.roster_f4: M+ rating, raid progression, PvP and Delve data in one place
landing.calendar_desc: Raiders don't need to visit the website. Create a raid — announcements, reminders, and RSVP collection happen automatically via the Discord bot.
landing.calendar_f1: Auto-generate raids a month ahead based on your schedule
landing.calendar_f2: RSVP via interactive buttons right in a Discord message
landing.calendar_f3: Pre-raid reminders and auto-announce next raid after completion
landing.calendar_f4: Encounter roster — assign players to each boss individually
landing.ai_desc: No more hunting for wipe culprits by hand. After every raid, the platform automatically pulls logs from WCL and generates a tactical report via AI.
landing.ai_f1: Chat with the log: ask AI why the tank died or who missed a cooldown
landing.ai_f2: Personal tactical reports for every player after each raid
landing.ai_f3: Automatic log fetch from Warcraft Logs after raid ends
landing.ai_f4: AI reports published to your Discord channel automatically
landing.planner_desc: A full-screen strategy editor with an interactive map. No more screenshots and MS Paint.
landing.planner_f1: Drag-and-drop players from your roster right onto the boss map
landing.planner_f2: Markers, zones, arrows, cones — a full set of tools
landing.planner_f4: Share plans in one click — even with unregistered players
landing.treasury_desc: Automatic weekly tax calculation based on live auction house prices. Always know how many weeks your reserves will last.
landing.treasury_f1: Consumable calculator with live Auction House prices
landing.treasury_f2: Weekly tax based on real consumable costs
landing.treasury_f3: Autonomy indicator: how many raid weeks the treasury covers
landing.treasury_f4: Full transaction history with per-member filtering
landing.cta_final_desc: Join the statics already using BlastR to manage their roster, analyze logs, and plan tactics.
